name: Jacob DeWitte
background: Dr. Jacob DeWitte is the co-founder and Chief Executive Officer of Oklo. He has been a director of Oklo since its inception in 2013. Dr. DeWitte has experience in the nuclear industry, working on reactor design and strategy. He holds a Ph.D. in Nuclear Engineering from the Massachusetts Institute of Technology.

company_affiliations.name: Oklo Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Chief Executive Officer, and Director
